import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def process_items(items: list[dict]) -> None:
    for item in items:
        logger.info("Processing item: %s", item["id"])


def validate_batch(records: list[dict]) -> None:
    for record in records:
        if record.get("active"):
            record["validated"] = True


def send_notifications(users: list[dict]) -> None:
    for user in users:
        if user.get("subscribed"):
            print(f"Notification sent to {user['email']}")


def update_metrics(events: list[dict]) -> None:
    for event in events:
        if event["type"] == "error":
            metrics_counter.inc()
